# hidden

## Plugin reference

- Description: Hidden app rail — no switcher; sidebar slides flush to the edge.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `AppRailFraming.Variant` "Hidden" → `HiddenFraming`
  - Uses: `apps/app-rail-framing.AppRailFraming`
